brief_summary: Four-rung price ladder (flagship / mid-wireless / specialty / value) with a steel-blue filled marker on each rung naming the 2026 75% answer at that tier: Sonnet 2026, QK75, Mammoth 75, Rainy 75. A bordeaux dashed pointer at the mid-wireless rung calls out the 2025 hole that QK75 filled — readers had to wait for a group buy or stretch budget.
data_sources: 75-percent-default.mdx § 'The supply side caught up' — 'The Mammoth75 is in group-buy state at Wuque Studio ... The Rainy 75 keeps a value-tier 75 on shelf ... The Sonnet 2026 covers the flagship band. QK75 covers the wireless mid-tier. Each price tier has at least one in-stock or near-in-stock 75 option ... In 2025 a buyer looking for a 75 at the $300 wireless tier had to either wait for a group buy to open or stretch the budget to a full custom.'
